key_risks: A sudden reversal in technology and semiconductor momentum could lead to significant underperformance.
Higher-than-expected inflation prints could trigger a hawkish repricing of Fed expectations, disproportionately hurting growth stocks.
Geopolitical tensions or supply chain disruptions could negatively impact the semiconductor industry and South Korean equities.

portfolio.rationale: Core broad market exposure to capture general equity upside in a stable macro environment.
Strong momentum and growth characteristics, supported by recent outperformance and AI trends.
High-beta play on technology and AI infrastructure build-out, showing exceptional recent returns.
Strong recent momentum and exposure to global semiconductor and electronics supply chains.

portfolio_rationale: This portfolio balances core US equity exposure with high-momentum technology and semiconductor themes. The inclusion of South Korea provides international diversification while maintaining alignment with the strong tech cycle.
rationale_summary: Overweighting technology and semiconductors to capture ongoing momentum, anchored by a core S&P 500 position.
